sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66433" key="mesoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (cf. <sense id="n66433.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέση</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg009.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the region of the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέση</foreign>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the middle region of the voice</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μελοποιΐα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> </cit> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
